input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.5.2
            TITLE: if pop-off valves, recirculation valves, or heat exchangers (intercoolers) are used, they must be

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.5.2: If pop-off valves, recirculation valves, or heat exchangers (intercoolers) are used, they must be
IC.2.5.2 If pop-off valves, recirculation valves, or heat exchangers (intercoolers) are used, they must be 
positioned in the intake system as shown in IC.2.4.2.b

final_answer: If pop-off valves, recirculation valves, or heat exchangers (intercoolers) are used, they must be positioned in the intake system as shown in IC.2.4.2.b
